attacks.name: パワーウィップ
attacks.text: 相手のポケモン1匹に、自分のエネルギー×10ダメージ。

attacks.name: くさむすび
attacks.text: 相手のにげるエネルギー×10ダメージを追加。

attacks.name: Power Whip
attacks.text: Choose 1 of your opponent's Pokémon. This attack does 10 damage for each Energy attached to Carnivine G to that Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

attacks.name: Grass Knot
attacks.text: Does 20 damage plus 10 more damage for each Colorless Energy in the Defending Pokémon's Retreat Cost (after applying effects to the Retreat Cost).

data.name: マナフィ

attacks.name: ダイビング
attacks.text: 自分の山札のカードを上から7枚見て、その中のカードを1枚、手札に加える。その後、残りのカードを山札にもどし、山札を切る。

attacks.name: みずのひかり
attacks.text: 相手のポケモン1匹に、20ダメージ。その後、そのポケモンに与えたダメージぶんのダメージカウンターを、自分からとる。

data.flavor_text: うまれたときから そなわっている ふしぎな ちからを つかうと どんな ポケモンとも こころが かよいあう。

attacks.name: Dive
attacks.text: Look at the top 7 cards of your deck, choose 1 of them, and put it into your hand. Put the other cards back on top of your deck. Shuffle your deck afterward.

attacks.name: Water Glow
attacks.text: Choose 1 of your opponent's Pokémon. This attack does 20 damage to that Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.) Remove from Manaphy the number of damage counters equal to the damage you did to that Pokémon.

data.name: ロトム

abilities.name: Type Shift
abilities.text: Once during your turn (before your attack), you may use this power. Rotom's type is Psychic until the end of your turn.

attacks.name: ポルターガイスト
attacks.text: 相手の手札を見て、その中の「トレーナーのカード」の枚数×10ダメージを追加。

data.flavor_text: でんきのような からだは いちぶの きかいに はいりこむことが できる。 そして そのからだで いたずらする。

abilities.name: Type Shift
abilities.text: Once during your turn (before your attack), you may use this power. Rotom's type is Psychic until the end of your turn.

attacks.name: Poltergeist
attacks.text: Look at your opponent's hand. This attack does 30 damage plus 10 more damage for each Trainer, Supporter, and Stadium card in your opponent's hand.

attacks.name: ノーズユニット
attacks.text: ポケボディーを持つ相手のポケモン全員に、それぞれ20ダメージ。

attacks.name: すごいはないき
attacks.text: 次の自分の番の終わりまで、自分のにげるエネルギーは、すべてなくなる。

attacks.name: Nose Unit
attacks.text: This attack does 20 damage to each of your opponent's Pokémon that has any Poké-Bodies. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

attacks.name: Loud Snort
attacks.text: Probopass G's Retreat Cost is 0 until the end of your next turn.

abilities.name: Eerie Aura
abilities.text: Put 1 damage counter on each of your opponent's Pokémon that remains Asleep between turns.

attacks.name: ダークスリープ
attacks.text: ダメージを与えるとき、すでに相手にダメージカウンターがのっているなら、相手をねむりにする。

abilities.name: Eerie Aura
abilities.text: Put 1 damage counter on each of your opponent's Pokémon that remains Asleep between turns.

attacks.name: Darkness Sleep
attacks.text: If the Defending Pokémon already has any damage counters on it, that Pokémon is now Asleep.

abilities.name: Galactic Switch
abilities.text: Once during your turn (before your attack), you may move an Energy card attached to one of your Pokémon SP to another of your Pokémon. Then, put 2 damage counters on Bronzong G. This power can't be used if Bronzong G is affected by a Special Condition.

attacks.name: ねんどうは
attacks.text: ダメージカウンターがのっている相手のベンチポケモン全員にも、それぞれ10ダメージ。

abilities.name: Galactic Switch
abilities.text: Once during your turn (before your attack), you may move an Energy card attached to one of your Pokémon SP to another of your Pokémon. Then, put 2 damage counters on Bronzong G. This power can't be used if Bronzong G is affected by a Special Condition.

attacks.name: Psychic Pulse
attacks.text: Does 10 damage to each of your opponent's Benched Pokémon that has any damage counters on it. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

data.name: アカギの策略
rules: 自分の山札から、「サポーター」と「基本エネルギー」と「名前に『ギンガ団の発明』とつくトレーナー」を、それぞれ1枚ずつ選び、相手プレイヤーに見せてから、手札に加える。その後、山札を切る。
サポートは、自分の番に1枚しか使えない。

abilities.name: Leap Away
abilities.text: Once during your turn (before your attack), if Toxicroak G is your Active Pokémon, you may flip a coin. If heads, return Toxicroak G and all cards attached to it to your hand. This Power can't be used if Toxicroak G is affected by a Special Condition.

attacks.name: ポイズンリベンジ
attacks.text: 前の相手の番に、相手のワザのダメージで、自分のポケモンがきぜつしていたなら、40ダメージを追加し、相手をどくにする。

abilities.name: Leap Away
abilities.text: Once during your turn (before your attack), if Toxicroak G is your Active Pokémon, you may flip a coin. If heads, return Toxicroak G and all cards attached to it to your hand. This Power can't be used if Toxicroak G is affected by a Special Condition.

attacks.name: Poison Revenge
attacks.text: If any of your Pokémon were Knocked Out by damage from an opponent's attack during his or her last turn, this attack does 20 damage plus 40 more damage and the Defending Pokémon is now Poisoned.

attacks.name: おみやげえらび
attacks.text: 自分の山札のカードを上から2枚見て、どちらか1枚を手札に加える。その後、残りの1枚を、山札の一番下にもどす。

attacks.name: Selecting Souvenirs
attacks.text: Look at the top 2 cards of your deck, choose 1 of them, and put it into your hand. Put the other card on the bottom of your deck.

attacks.name: すてみボム
attacks.text: 相手のポケモン全員に、それぞれ20ダメージ。自分にも100ダメージ。

attacks.name: エネリフレクト
attacks.text: 自分のエネルギーを1個、自分のベンチポケモンにつけ替える。（自分のベンチポケモンがいないなら、この効果はなくなる。）

attacks.name: Reckless Bomb
attacks.text: This attack does 20 damage to each of your opponent's Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.) Electrode G does 100 damage to itself.

attacks.name: Reflect Energy
attacks.text: Move an Energy card attached to Electrode G to 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

abilities.name: Magical Return
abilities.text: As often as you like during your turn (before your attack), you may return a Pokémon Tool or Technical Machine card attached to your Pokémon to your hand. This power can't be used if Mismagius GL is affected by a Special Condition.

attacks.name: やみのまじない
attacks.text: 自分の手札の枚数ぶんのダメージカウンターを、相手にのせる。このワザでのせられるダメージカウンターは、８個まで。

abilities.name: Magical Return
abilities.text: As often as you like during your turn (before your attack), you may return a Pokémon Tool or Technical Machine card attached to your Pokémon to your hand. This power can't be used if Mismagius GL is affected by a Special Condition.

attacks.name: Darkness Magic
attacks.text: Count the number of cards in your hand. Put that many damage counters on the Defending Pokémon. You can't put more than 8 damage counters in this way.

attacks.name: Mysterious Beam
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, discard an Energy card attached to the Defending Pokémon.

data.name: ギンガ団の発明G-109 SPレーダー
rules:
自分の手札を1枚、山札にもどす。
自分の山札のSPポケモンを1枚、相手プレイヤーに見せてから、手札に加える。その後、山札を切る。
（自分の手札がこのカード1枚だけなら、このカードは使えない。）
グッズは、自分の番に何枚でも使える。

en.name: Team Galactic's Invention G-109 SP Radar

attacks.name: トラッシュボルト
attacks.text: 自分の手札のエネルギーを1枚トラッシュ。（トラッシュできないなら、このワザは失敗。）

attacks.name: Trash Bolt
attacks.text: Discard an Energy card from your hand. (If you can't discard a card from your hand, this attack does nothing.)

abilities.name: Roger
abilities.text: Whenever a player responds to their opponent to express agreement during a game, that player places his or her hand on his or her chest and answers "Roger".

attacks.name: かわらわり
attacks.text: このワザは、相手の抵抗力・すべての効果に関係なく、ダメージを与える。

attacks.name: フィーバーステップ
attacks.text: コインを１回投げオモテなら、相手のベンチポケモン全員にも、それぞれ10ダメージ。ウラなら、自分のベンチポケモン全員にも、それぞれ10ダメージ。

abilities.name: Roger
abilities.text: Whenever a player responds to their opponent to express agreement during a game, that player places his or her hand on his or her chest and answers "Roger".

attacks.name: Brick Break
attacks.text: This attack's damage isn't affected by Resistance, Poké-Powers, Poké-Bodies, or any other effects on the Defending Pokémon.

attacks.name: Fever Step
attacks.text: Flip a coin. this attack does 10 damage to each of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. If tails, this attack does 10 damage to each of your own Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

data.name: バトルタワー
rules: おたがいのプレイヤーが、手札から「ポケモンのカード」を出してポケモンをレベルアップさせるたび、そのポケモンのダメージカウンターを4個とる。
スタジアムは、自分の番に1枚だけ、バトル場の横に出せる。別の名前のスタジアムが場に出たなら、このカードをトラッシュする。

data.name: 勝利のメダル
rules:
コインを2回投げる。
オモテが1回なら、自分の山札からカードを1枚引く。
すべてオモテなら、自分の山札の好きなカードを1枚、手札に加える。その後、山札を切る。
グッズは、自分の番に何枚でも使える。

data.flavor_text: ベロは にんげんのものに そっくり。 そのため にんげんの はなすことばを じょうずに まねることが できる。

attacks.name: Encore
attacks.text: Choose 1 of the Defending Pokémon's attacks. That Pokémon can use only that attack during your opponent's next turn.

data.name: ワンダー・プラチナ
rules:
ウラになっている自分のサイドのオモテをすべて見て、もとにもどす。
のぞむなら、その中のエネルギーを1枚、相手プレイヤーに見せてから、手札に加えてよい。
手札に加えた場合、このカードはトラッシュせず、オモテにして自分のサイドにおく。
グッズは、自分の番に何枚でも使える。

data.name: アルセウス

attacks.name: はもんのうねり
attacks.text: 自分の場に「アルセウス」が6匹いて、それらがそれぞれちがうタイプなら、自分の山札の基本エネルギーを6枚まで選び、自分のポケモンそれぞれに1枚ずつつける。その後、山札を切る。

attacks.name: てんのやり
attacks.text: 相手のポケモン1匹に、80ダメージ。自分のエネルギーをすべてはがしてロストゾーンにおく。

data.flavor_text: なにも ない ばしょに あった タマゴのなかから すがたを あらわし せかいを うみだしたと されている。

attacks.name: Ripple Swell
attacks.text: If you have 6 Arceus in play and each of them is a different type, search your deck for up to 6 basic Energy cards. Attach each of those Energy cards to a different Pokémon you have in play. Shuffle your deck afterward.

attacks.name: Sky Spear
attacks.text: Choose 1 of your opponent's Pokémon. This attack does 80 damage to that Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon). Remove all Energy cards attached to Arceus and put them in the Lost Zone.

data.flavor_text: なにも ない ばしょに あった タマゴのなかから すがたを あらわし せかいを うみだしたと されている。

attacks.text: Discard 1 Energy card attached to Heatran.

data.name: 勝利のメダル
rules:
コインを2回投げる。
オモテが1回なら、自分の山札からカードを1枚引く。
すべてオモテなら、自分の山札の好きなカードを1枚、手札に加える。その後、山札を切る。
グッズは、自分の番に何枚でも使える。
